summary: Core matrix_generator.py is well-structured with good validation and error handling. Critical failures: (1) Workflow actions not pinned to SHA (lines 9, 12)—explicit requirement violation. (2) Missing fixture JSON files (referenced throughout run_workflow_tests.py but not provided). (3) Tests run directly in workflow, not via external harness that invokes 'act push --rm' and produces act-result.txt as required. (4) No actionlint validation step in workflow. (5) Task mandates external test harness setting up temp repos per test case—not implemented. Solution runs tests inside pipeline, not through act as specified.
